text.title: rag Output Contract
text.summary: JSON schema for one RAG answer: text + validated citations + faithfulness score + retrieval metadata.

example.code: { "query": "How do I rotate JWT refresh tokens?", "answer": "Rotate the refresh token on each use [Source: auth-guide.md, page 12]. The old token is revoked once a new pair is issued.", "citations": [{"source": "auth-guide.md", "page": 12, "chunk_id": "auth-guide.md#c-007", "validated": true}], "retrieval": {"top_k": 20, "rerank_top_k": 5, "latency_ms": 312}, "faithfulness": 0.94, "fallback_to_no_answer": false }
example.note: Valid: cited chunk validated against retrieved metadata, faithfulness above gate.
Invalid: no citations, faithfulness below launch gate, retrieval object missing.

text.reference: Validates an answer against this schema.
